decisions.rationale: The observation describes the Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave Corridor — 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay in Brooklyn, served by the B44 bus route. The observation's base_record_id corridor_nostrand-avenue already captures this exact corridor: same streets (Nostrand + Rogers), same limits (Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay), same borough (Brooklyn), and the source 201110_nostrand_cb8_slides is already listed in that record's source_ids with the alias corridor_nostrand-ave-rogers-ave-cb8-2011. The closest match is the observation's own base record; per canonicalization rules, no different target_record_id is warranted.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay

proposed_relations.description: Both records describe the same physical corridor: Nostrand Avenue / Rogers Avenue from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay (9.3 miles), served by B44, in Brooklyn. corridor_nostrand-avenue aggregates multiple CB presentations; corridor_nostrand-rogers-20111205 is from a single CB3 presentation but shares identical limits, streets, length, route, and borough.
